examples: Almost all fictional detectives are unreal.
The violence in those films was too unreal, it was make-believe.
The kids there live unreal lives where money, beauty and pleasure are the only gods.
David Pountney, the director, wisely avoids documentary realism, instead giving the Auschwitz scenes an unreal sheen.
"The whole thing is unreal and it's only just sinking in, " said the Glens striker.
